message:
fix(compat_persist): detect positive-rootpage virtual tables on reopen

The is_virtual predicate used `&&` to require BOTH rootpage=0 AND CREATE
VIRTUAL TABLE SQL. FrankenSQLite-native virtual tables (e.g. FTS5 modules
with a materialized root page) have a positive rootpage, so they failed
the first condition and fell through to ordinary B-tree table parsing on
reopen — silently corrupting the schema state.

Fix: use `||` (via the existing `is_virtual_table_sql` helper) so that a
table is skipped if EITHER its rootpage is 0 OR its CREATE SQL begins with
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE. Closes PR #33.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
